title: enneapogon cenchroides
intro: Enneapogon cenchroides, also known as the spiny windmill grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Enneapogon cenchroides include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
